name: Mama's Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: Peeled raw potatoes, cut into small cubes (2 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 3-quart saucepan and add minced garlic, chopped onions, peeled tomatoes, and chopped green chilies. Saute for 3 minutes.
2. Stir in flour and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Gradually pour in the hot chicken broth while stirring continuously.
4. Add potatoes, salt, and pepper to the pot. Cover and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes.
5. Add sliced carrots and zucchini, then cook for another 15 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
6. Just before serving, add cubed Monterey Jack cheese.
7. Serve and enjoy. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
